positive: Minimalist stylized geometric forest scene, featuring stylized towering flora and fauna rendered in interlocking abstract shapes and clean silhouettes. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing a palette of deep indigo, muted sage green, and stark creamy white. Focus on bold negative space and strong line work, reminiscent of woodblock printing or simplified tattoo flash art. The forest elements (stylized deer, crescent moons, abstract trees, geometric butterflies) should be arranged to create a repeating, visually harmonious pattern suitable for apparel print. Studio lighting, vector quality, extremely crisp edges, high contrast, ultra-detailed.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, grainy, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, extra limbs, malformed, poor anatomy, low detail, clutter, 3d rendering
